expectations.evidence: Traffic spike → 502 errors → 小杰 proposes 64-core server (vertical scaling anti-pattern) → 小球 guides student to discover horizontal scaling + LB
Full teaching: What is LB, DNS fundamentals, DNS-based LB. Chunk map, Feynman Gates (Recall + Transfer) all present.
Story elements are 2-3 lines per appearance. E.g., 小杰's Slack message is 2 lines, 小球's reaction is 1 line.
小杰's 64-core proposal = common interview anti-pattern (vertical vs horizontal). 小球's Feynman Gate questions are in-character. 小杰 asks a good question about DNS LB reliability.
Restaurant host analogy (same core concept), but framed through the crisis scenario which makes it more memorable.
Story creates urgency ('the site is DOWN'), character conflict creates curiosity, teaching resolves the crisis. Strong narrative momentum.

notes: Story perfectly integrated with teaching. 小杰's wrong answer is the common SD interview anti-pattern. Teaching content unchanged in depth and quality.
